extracted_codes.context: Exclude subjects with malignant cancer, identified by meeting the following criteria: 4 or more inpatient or outpatient diagnoses on different days with any ICD9 code between 140.* and 209*

Exclude subjects with malignant cancer, identified by meeting the following criteria: 4 or more inpatient or outpatient diagnoses on different days with any ICD9 code between 140.* and 209* and any C* ICD10 code
Capture all ICD values and age for BMI measures. ICD9 codes V85*
Capture all ICD values and age for BMI measures. ICD10 codes Z68*

clinical_criteria: 4 or more inpatient or outpatient diagnoses on different days for malignant cancer exclusion
At least 2 medication indications separated by at least 180 days for flagging various medication categories
10+ consecutive days of oral steroid use for flagging
algorithm_summary: This BMI phenotype algorithm is adapted from the Geisinger Extreme Obesity Algorithm for eMERGE Phase-IV. The algorithm: (1) Cleans height and weight data using Bayesian outlier rejection and Gaussian Process regression, (2) Excludes subjects with malignant cancer (4+ diagnoses with ICD-9 140.*-209* or ICD-10 C* codes), (3) Excludes subjects who have taken growth hormone or appetite suppressants, (4) Excludes BMI values after bariatric surgery, (5) Requires minimum 3 BMI measures, (6) Calculates BMI and identifies maximum and most recent valid measures, (7) Flags subjects based on various medication exposures (antipsychotics, oral steroids, stimulants, insulin, beta-blockers, thyroid medications, SSRIs) using specific timing criteria (2+ indications separated by 180+ days), and (8) Captures ICD codes for BMI ranges (V85*, Z68*) for internal validation.
